nasb.text: And He *went up on the mountain and *summoned those whom He Himself wanted, and they came to Him.

esv.text: And he went up on the mountain and called to him those whom he desired, and they came to him.

cnv.text: 耶穌上了山，呼召自己所要的人，他們就來了。

ccb.text: 耶稣上了山，把合自己心意的人召集到跟前，

csbs.text: 耶稣上了山，召来那些他想要的人，他们就来到他那里。
